요한계시록 7:1.content: After this, I saw four angels standing at the four corners of the earth, holding the four winds of the earth, so that no wind would blow on the earth, or on the sea, or on any tree.

요한계시록 7:2.content: I saw another angel ascend from the sunrise, having the seal of the living God. He cried with a loud voice to the four angels to whom it was given to harm the earth and the sea,

요한계시록 7:3.content: saying, “Don’t harm the earth, neither the sea, nor the trees, until we have sealed the bondservants of our God on their foreheads!”

요한계시록 7:4.content: I heard the number of those who were sealed, one hundred forty-four thousand, sealed out of every tribe of the children of Israel:

요한계시록 7:5.content: of the tribe of Judah twelve thousand were sealed, of the tribe of Reuben twelve thousand, of the tribe of Gad twelve thousand,

요한계시록 7:6.content: of the tribe of Asher twelve thousand, of the tribe of Naphtali twelve thousand, of the tribe of Manasseh twelve thousand,

요한계시록 7:7.content: of the tribe of Simeon twelve thousand, of the tribe of Levi twelve thousand, of the tribe of Issachar twelve thousand,

요한계시록 7:8.content: of the tribe of Zebulun twelve thousand, of the tribe of Joseph twelve thousand, and of the tribe of Benjamin twelve thousand were sealed.

요한계시록 7:9.content: After these things I looked, and behold, a great multitude, which no man could count, out of every nation and of all tribes, peoples, and languages, standing before the throne and before the Lamb, dressed in white robes, with palm branches in their hands.

요한계시록 7:10.content: They cried with a loud voice, saying, “Salvation be to our God, who sits on the throne, and to the Lamb!”

요한계시록 7:11.content: All the angels were standing around the throne, the elders, and the four living creatures; and they fell on their faces before his throne, and worshiped God,

요한계시록 7:12.content: saying, “Amen! Blessing, glory, wisdom, thanksgiving, honor, power, and might, be to our God forever and ever! Amen.”

요한계시록 7:13.content: One of the elders answered, saying to me, “These who are arrayed in the white robes, who are they, and where did they come from?”

요한계시록 7:14.content: I told him, “My lord, you know.” He said to me, “These are those who came out of the great suffering.They washed their robes, and made them white in the Lamb’s blood.

요한계시록 7:15.content: Therefore they are before the throne of God, they serve him day and night in his temple. He who sits on the throne will spread his tabernacle over them.

요한계시록 7:16.content: They will never be hungry or thirsty any more. The sun won’t beat on them, nor any heat;

요한계시록 7:17.content: for the Lamb who is in the middle of the throne shepherds them and leads them to springs of life-giving waters. And God will wipe away every tear from their eyes.”
